prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约223→163→201→161→350名。2021–2024年基本稳定在160–220名区间，2025年大幅后移至350名，较2024年后移约189名，为近五年最大波动。2025年基准位次约350名；该校在广西理科组招生计划：2021年21人、2022年21人、2023年29人、2024年（物理类）16人、2025年（物理类）21人；2026年计划22人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩招幅度约4.8%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第6位，2022–2026年稳定第5位，属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风等舆情事件；但2025年声誉评价偏正面（新闻传播学A++等科研成果）。抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续高涨。历史投档异常方面，2021年河南投档线位列TOP4，2022年河南投档线暴跌属个别省份现象，对广西影响有限；复旦大学A-及以上学科达27个，涵盖哲学A+、理论经济学A+、中国语言文学A+、新闻传播学A+、数学A+、物理学A+、生物学A+、政治学A+、马克思主义理论A+等，学科实力顶尖。理科组招生专业涉及数学类、工科试验班（人工智能/机器人/集成电路方向）、经济管理试验班等，与优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐；人工智能谨慎观望但关注度高。广西2026年总考生约39.2万人，较2025年约38.0万人增加约1.2万人（增幅约3.2%）；按近年比例估算物理类考生约26.9万人，较2025年26.0万人增加约0.9万人，竞争略有加剧。；复旦大学位于上海，属一线城市，对广西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在广西招生规模较小（理科组约20人左右），属于跨省招生占比极低的顶尖名校，地域偏好对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招、广西考生总数增加及抖音高热关注度，预计2026年理科组竞争较2025年略有加剧但后移幅度收窄。在2025年基准350名基础上，考虑扩招使位次数字增大、考生增加加剧竞争，预测最低位次约380名，区间350–410名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在380名左右，区间350–410名。建议位次在350名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（工科试验班智能机器人方向、数学类）；位次在350–410名之间的考生以二档专业为主力选择（经济管理试验班、工科试验班材料方向）；位次在410名之后的考生可考虑三档专业保底。注意复旦物理类所有专业均要求选考化学，报考时需确认选科符合要求。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 223 → 163 → 201 → 161 → 350. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable in the 160–220 range, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 350, a shift of about 189 places compared to 2024, marking the largest fluctuation in five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 350. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Guangxi: 21 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 16 in 2024 (Physics Category), 21 in 2025 (Physics Category); the 2026 plan is 22, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4.8%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 6th in 2021 and remained stable at 5th from 2022 to 2026, placing it among the top-tier universities in China, with a strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to incidents related to teacher ethics and conduct; however, in 2025, its reputation evaluation was positive (e.g., research achievements in Journalism and Communication A++). It ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained high attention for applications. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2021, the admission line in Henan was among the top 4, and the sharp drop in Henan in 2022 was an isolated provincial phenomenon, with limited impact on Guangxi. Fudan has 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including Philosophy A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Biology A+, Political Science A+, and Marxist Theory A+, demonstrating top-tier academic strength. The science group enrollment majors include Mathematics, Engineering Experimental Class (AI/Robotics/Integrated Circuits direction), and Economics and Management Experimental Class, which are highly correlated with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other science and engineering majors have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026; AI is cautiously observed but has high attention. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 (approximately 3.2%) compared to about 380,000 in 2025; based on recent proportions, it is estimated that there are about 269,000 Physics Category examinees, an increase of about 9,000 compared to 260,000 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi students; however, its enrollment scale in Guangxi is small (about 20 students in the science group), making it a top-tier prestigious university with a very low proportion of cross-provincial enrollment, so regional preference has a limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the increase in the total number of examinees in Guangxi, and the high attention on Douyin, it is expected that competition in the 2026 science group will be slightly more intense than in 2025, but the degree of backward shift will narrow. Based on the 2025 baseline of 350, taking into account that expansion increases the ranking number and the increase in examinees intensifies competition, the predicted minimum ranking is about 380, with a range of 350–410.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Innovation School of Intelligent Robots and Advanced Manufacturing)
- Mathematics Class (Elite Student Training Base).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Innovation School of Intelligent Materials and Future Energy)
- Environmental Science
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Statistics, Operations Research, and AI).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Atmospheric Science
- Biological Sciences
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Bio-Manufacturing Leading Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 380, with a range of 350–410. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 350 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Engineering Experimental Class Intelligent Robotics direction, Mathematics Class); candidates with rankings between 350–410 should primarily consider Tier 2 majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, Engineering Experimental Class Materials direction); candidates with rankings above 410 can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Note that all Fudan Physics Category majors require Chemistry as a subject, so candidates must confirm that their subject selection meets the requirements.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科组最低位次约56→36→48→57→58名。2021–2025年整体稳定在36–58名区间，近三年（2023–2025）位次为48→57→58，呈小幅后移趋势但幅度极小。2025年基准位次约58名；该校在广西文科组招生计划：2021年9人、2022年10人、2023年10人、2024年（历史类）10人、2025年（历史类）9人；2026年计划9人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科排名全国第5位，属顶尖综合类大学，文科底蕴深厚，对文科高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，但2025年偏正面（新闻传播学A++等）。抖音热度排名第4（高热），报考关注度持续高涨。历史投档异常方面，2021–2023年河南等省份投档线波动属个别现象，对广西影响有限；复旦大学文科优势学科极为突出：哲学A+、理论经济学A+、中国语言文学A+、新闻传播学A+、政治学A+、马克思主义理论A+、中国史A+、法学A-等。文科组招生专业涉及经济学类、法学、中国语言文学类、社会科学试验班等，均对应顶尖学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学2024年分化观望但整体偏热，汉语言/中文推荐，新闻传播明显劝退。广西2026年历史类考生按比例估算约12.4万人，较2025年11.9万人增加约0.5万人（增幅约4.2%），竞争略有加剧但幅度有限。；复旦大学位于上海，对广西文科考生有较强地域吸引力；招生规模极小（约9–10人），属顶尖名校在广西的稀缺名额，竞争格局高度稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高度稳定（近三年48–58名）、2026年招生计划持平、考生小幅增加但幅度有限，预计2026年文科组竞争格局基本延续。在2025年基准58名基础上，考虑考生总数小幅增加使竞争略有加剧，预测最低位次约60名，区间55–65名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 56→36→48→57→58. Overall, it remained stable within the 36–58 range from 2021 to 2025. In the recent three years (2023–2025), the rankings were 48→57→58, showing a slight backward trend but with minimal magnitude. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 58. The enrollment plan for this university in the Guangxi liberal arts group: 9 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 10 in 2024 (History Category), and 9 in 2025 (History Category). The plan for 2026 is 9 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 5th nationally by Soft Science, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities with profound liberal arts heritage, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but in 2025 it was slightly positive (Journalism and Communication A++, etc.). It ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with continuously high application attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, fluctuations in admission lines in provinces like Henan from 2021 to 2023 are isolated incidents with limited impact on Guangxi. Fudan University's liberal arts advantageous disciplines are extremely prominent: Philosophy A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Political Science A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chinese History A+, Law A-, etc. The liberal arts group enrollment majors include Economics, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Social Science Experimental Class, etc., all corresponding to top-tier disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 showed differentiation and wait-and-see but overall remains hot; Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Guangxi is approximately 124,000, an increase of about 5,000 (approximately 4.2%) compared to 119,000 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition but with limited magnitude. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Guangxi liberal arts candidates. The enrollment scale is very small (about 9–10 students), representing scarce slots for top prestigious universities in Guangxi, with a highly stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings (48–58 in the recent three years), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the slight increase in candidate numbers with limited magnitude, it is expected that the competitive landscape for the liberal arts group in 2026 will largely continue. Based on the 2025 baseline of 58, and taking into account the slight intensification of competition due to the small increase in total candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 60, with a range of 55–65.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 60, with a range of 55–65. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 55 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics Class); candidates with rankings between 55–65 should primarily choose Tier 2 majors (Chinese Language and Literature Class, Social Science Experimental Class); candidates with rankings after 65 may consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option. All Fudan liberal arts majors have no restrictions on re-selected subjects, offering high application flexibility.
